fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection logic on line 70 is incorrect. It uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`) which fails to detect conflicts when intervals touch at their boundaries, whereas the specification requires treating touching intervals as overlaps.

spec.expr: not (start__1 == e or end__1 == s) or not (end__1 <= s or start__1 >= e)

constraints.intent: If intervals touch at a boundary, the non-overlap check must evaluate to false.
Any checked interval that does not cause an early exit must be strictly non-overlapping.

spec.expr: all((end__1 < s or start__1 > e) for s, e in existing)

constraints.intent: An interval should only be added to the schedule if it does not conflict with any existing reservations.

spec.expr: __cbfl_result[0] == False or all((end__1 < s or start__1 > e) for s, e in existing)

constraints.intent: If an interval is accepted, it must not have had a boundary-touching conflict with any existing one.
